creator: comet.berkeley@gmail.com
text:
My above patch is in the wrong place...and this bug seems to be fixed when I test using a ".calendar/calendar" file containing this:

#include <calendar.usholiday>
sat+3   Every third saturday of each month

$calendar -t19.3.2011 
Mar 19* Every third saturday of each month
Mar 20* Vernal Equinox

I will look for a better place for my patch.

But is this bug actually caused by fixed bug 186294, the bug about #include using double quotes?
